xPosts.content: The emergence of superintelligence is not going to be an event. We don't have anything close to a
xPosts.highlights: Yann LeCun argues that superintelligence will emerge gradually rather than as a sudden event, suggesting current AI systems are far from achieving it.
xPosts.worthReading: This perspective challenges common narratives about AI timelines and provides insight from a leading researcher.

interestSummary: Based on a single, truncated post, Yann LeCun's recent focus appears to be on countering narratives about a sudden emergence of superintelligence, arguing current AI is far from that point.
